pages.raw_text:
Carelessaess nearly caused the
death of A. b. Brown few min
utes after IL o'clock this morning
when an explosion Of dynamite
knocked him 10 feet and mutilated
his face so badly he will probably
lose his eyesight. Brown is a min
err and is one of thse employed by
Patterson 4 Tomlinson, railroad
contractors. who are working on
the Corbin right of way south of
the o. II. & N. freight depot. The
men put in number of drill holes
last night and just before quitting
work they were discharged. Owing
to the closeness of the discharges
one of them missed and the men
did not realize it. When they came
to work this morning they loaded
and carted off the dirt and rock
which had been blasted loose from
the great mound they are working
on and set to work drilling new
holes to blast tonight. Several
holes were sunk and work had been
